content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Represent claim, fetch, parse, validate, normalize, commit, publish, fail, cancel, and supersede states as exhaustive discriminated results.

hints: For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Ingestion State Union model · Theory Feed Ts Ing…, name the reader, publisher, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, tenant, URL, unknown XML, runtime validation, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, PostgreSQL, Express, handle, accessibility, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Feed Ts Ingestion State Union precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Ingestion State Union model · Theory Feed Ts Ing…, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 5883 during a clean emitted-package and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile exhaustive async states, immutable stages, atomic commit, post-commit effects, and counts; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then reorder one timer, Promise, claim, lease, fencing, worker, disconnect, or shutdown settlement and exclude stale effects. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Represent claim, fetch, parse, validate, normalize, commit, publish, fail, cancel, and supersede states as exhaustive discriminated results.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Ingestion State Union model · Theory Feed Ts Ing…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Thrown exceptions alone describe the ingestion state machine.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: feed-ts-ingestion-state-union-10itqw.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-ts-ingestion-state-union-10itqw(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_feed_ts_ingestion_state_union_10itqw\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?stageTransitions < 12)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?settledTransitions < 12 \|\| settledTransitions > stageTransitions)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?failureCases < 4)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?partialCommits > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
